title: Designing a Chatbot for Mental Health Support
scenario: Create a chatbot that provides mental health support and resources to users. The chatbot should be able to recognize symptoms of mental health conditions and provide personalized recommendations for resources and support. The input should be a user's symptoms and concerns, and the output should be a list of recommended resources and next steps.
constraints: Must include a symptom recognition algorithm
Must include a list of recommended resources and next steps

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the response includes a symptom recognition algorithm
Check if the response includes a list of recommended resources and next steps
Check if the response is empathetic and non-judgmental
Check if the response adheres to the constraints on length
